code: import React from'react';import{FiMap}from'react-icons/fi';import{generateDynamicData}from'../../utils/dynamicData';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const RoleRoadmap=_ref=>{let{skillId}=_ref;const data=generateDynamicData(skillId);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"space-y-6 animate-fadeIn",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{className:"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FiMap,{className:"text-blue-500"})," Career Trajectory for ",data.skill]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"relative border-l-2 border-blue-100 ml-4 space-y-8",children:data.roadmapRoles.map((role,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"relative pl-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`absolute -left-[9px] top-1 w-4 h-4 rounded-full border-2 border-white ${role.status==='Current'?'bg-blue-500':role.status==='Target'?'bg-indigo-500':'bg-purple-500'}`}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"font-bold text-blue-600 mb-1",children:role.year}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bg-gray-50 p-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{className:"font-bold text-gray-900",children:role.role}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1",children:["Status: ",role.status]})]})]},i))})]})});};export default RoleRoadmap;
